files.00_Overview.md: ADD: 3W Framework sections (What are non-Newtonian fluids, Why they matter for CFD, How OpenFOAM implements them). ADD: Learning Objectives. ADD: Key Takeaways summary. IMPROVE: The Quick Reference table should be in Key Takeaways. FIX: Missing cohesive narrative - currently just bullet points.
files.01_Non_Newtonian_Fundamentals.md: CONSOLIDATE: Has excellent 3W framework with tomato sauce analogy. KEEP: Strong conceptual foundation with real-world examples. REMOVE: Some redundant content that repeats in Overview. IMPROVE: ADD explicit Learning Objectives at top. FIX: Image placement markers need proper formatting.
files.02_Viscosity_Models.md: EXPAND: Currently just formula dump. NEED: Add 3W framework - What each model represents, When to use which model, How parameters affect behavior. ADD: Model selection flowchart. ADD: Parameter sensitivity discussion. MISSING: Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways.
files.03_OpenFOAM_Architecture.md: IMPROVE: Has good technical content but needs better 3W structure. ADD: Learning Objectives. EXPAND: File location references for each class. ADD: Code snippets from actual OpenFOAM source files. FIX: Virtual function explanation is good but could be clearer with examples.
files.04_Numerical_Implementation.md: RESTRUCTURE: Mixes implementation details with numerical issues. SEPARATE: Core implementation (What) from numerical stability (How). ADD: Learning Objectives. MISSING: Key Takeaways. IMPROVE: Add troubleshooting section with common errors.
files.05_Practical_Usage.md: GOOD: Practical focus is appropriate. ADD: Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways. EXPAND: Add complete worked example case setup. ADD: Post-processing visualization examples. MISSING: Parameter estimation strategies (how to get n, K, etc. from experimental data).

global_strategy: UNIFY: Eliminate redundancy between Overview (00) and Fundamentals (01) - Overview should be high-level roadmap, Fundamentals should be deep theory. STANDARDIZE: All files need explicit Learning Objectives at start and Key Takeaways at end. ENHANCE: Add cross-references between viscosity models (02) and their numerical implementation (04). COMPLETE: Missing learning infrastructure (objectives, takeaways, practice problems) across all files. CONSOLIDATE: Model equations appear in multiple files - keep authoritative definitions in 02, reference elsewhere.
